name: podium-mcp
description: Mobile + canvas automation MCP — 51 tools for AI agents: iOS (simulator + real) & Android control, native UI automation, Maestro E2E flows, React Native/Metro debugging, WebView DOM + network, and a no-vision canvas/WebGL brain (Pixi/Konva/Fabric/Phaser/Three/Babylon) that drives game UIs like DOM — ~5x fewer tokens than screenshots. Requires macOS + Xcode.
